summary: A project related to Vicarious Thru-Hikers, featuring a guest book with location fields and a Trail Map.
known_issues: Guest book location field shows 'Actor not available' error when adding a location
Label 'Favorite AT Location' needs to be changed to 'Favorite Location on the Trail'

existing_features.title: Rename the label 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' everywhere it appears in the frontend, including in the AddEntryPage form, any placeholder or helper text, and any related labels in EntryDetailPage, GuestbookFeedPage, or other components.

Fix the 'Actor not available' error that occurs when a user attempts to add a location while signing the guest book. Investigate and resolve the actor initialization or availability check in the relevant mutation/query hooks (useQueries.ts, useActor.ts usage in AddEntryPage) so that the actor is properly awaited or re-fetched before the location submission is attempted.
